# Intelligent LLM Invocation — Drift Anchor
*Generated by PlanForge on 2026-03-25. Not a deliverable — specdrift reference only.*

## Problem
The speedrift dark factory has monitoring agents (factory_brain, northstardrift, driftdriver, speedriftd) that run on fixed timers and fire LLM calls regardless of whether there is any signal to act on. They burn tokens producing reports but do not close the loop into actual work — stalled tasks stay stalled, drift stays unresolved, upstream changes go unacted on. The fix must address both the cost problem (signal-gate LLM calls so they only fire when there is evidence to act on) and the action-loop problem (ensure findings become wg tasks that complete), within the existing workgraph + driftdriver + speedriftd architecture without restructuring the module ecosystem.

## Solution
Per-agent signal gates + task wiring (bottom-up, minimum scope). Add a `should_fire()` pre-check before each agent's LLM call using content-hash-based evidence detection (disk-persisted, not in-process memory). Wire existing report/log outputs to `guarded_add_drift_task()` with dedup by stable `(repo, lane, finding-type)` task IDs. Each agent's gate is an independent config flag in `drift-policy.toml` — enable one, measure token spend drop, validate, then move to next. Rollback is a flag flip. Rollout order follows causal chain: cost meter → dispatch pipeline verification → driftdriver → northstardrift → speedriftd → factory_brain.

## Out of Scope
- SDK/API migration (separate workstream)
- Module consolidation or restructuring
- New agent frameworks or event bus infrastructure
- Upstream dependency tracking (layer on after inner loop works)
- Prompt evolution / wg evolve
- Outcome learning / resolution rate feedback
- Daily report formatting/presentation (build loop first, then format)
- Enabling factory_brain at full capacity until micro-dose validation proves gates hold

## Success Criteria
- Daily report shows what the dark factory actually did: dead code removed, drift resolved, plans built, features shipped
- Agent LLM calls are signal-gated — only fire when content hash differs from last-run hash (disk-persisted)
- Stalled workgraph tasks get detected and unblocked or re-queued automatically
- Per-agent token spend is observable before and after each gate change (cost meter prerequisite)
- Dispatch pipeline verified: existing wg tasks are being dispatched and completed before task wiring deployed

## Key Constraints
- Do not consolidate or restructure the module ecosystem
- Optimize and wire what exists — do not rebuild
- YAGNI: no new frameworks, no new agent runtimes
- Micro-dose rollout: each signal gate independently testable and disableable before the next is enabled
- Observable spend: per-agent token cost visible before/after each change to verify gate is working
- Factory_brain remains disabled until its gate is proven in dry-run mode

## Dissenting Concerns
- SHOW-STOPPER (prerequisite): Per-agent token cost observability does not exist. claude CLI `--max-budget-usd` is a cap not a meter. Must build cost logging (wrap CLI invocations to log input/output token counts from JSON response) before any micro-dose rollout begins.
- SHOW-STOPPER (prerequisite): Dispatch pipeline reliability is unverified. Task wiring feeds into a pipeline whose throughput is unknown — must confirm tasks are being dispatched and completed before wiring more findings into it.
- Silent failure risk: a gate bug returning "no evidence" always looks identical to "working" from the outside. A canary log (log when evidence IS detected, alert when silent >1h) is essential.
- The `should_sweep()` 600s unconditional timer in `factory_brain/router.py` creates a cost floor independent of event gating — must also be gated or removed.
- Cross-agent signal dedup is unaddressed: a single stall triggers detectable signal in factory_brain, northstardrift, AND speedriftd simultaneously. Per-agent gating does not prevent 3 LLM calls for the same root cause.
- Sequential micro-dose leaves the ecosystem with less monitoring during the fix than during the broken state. Acceptable tradeoff if understood.
